Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
T-MSIS TAF Annual Provider RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.3 4 

ALPTHC_OSTPTHC_PHYSN_TXNMY_IND 

LABEL: Allopathic or Osteopathic Physician Taxonomy Indicator — Ever in Calendar Year 

DESCRIPTION: Indicates whether the provider’s taxonomy value maps to the allopathic, osteopathic physicians’ 
category; ever in the calendar year. 

SHORT NAME: ALPTHC_OSTPTHC_PHYSN_TXNMY_IND 

LONG NAME: ALPTHC_OSTPTHC_PHYSN_TXNMY_IND 

TYPE: CHAR
